headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Healthpeak Properties, Raises Price Target to $22
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst John Kilichowski   maintains Healthpeak Properties (NYSE:DOC) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $20 to $22.
